raw_text: One item in the order was missing on reporting it was said that the refund for the particular will be issued. Haven't received it yet and there's no way i can contact customer support as it is stating 24 hrs completed after your order

Amazing, Dear Team Blinkit, I want to thank you for the exceptional service today. I ordered medicine at midnight and was pleasantly surprised when a doctor call was arranged within minutes after payment. The doctor was very thorough, asked all relevant questions, and provided clear treatment advice. This kind of instant telemedicine support at odd hours is truly amazing. Keep up the great work!

This was honestly one of the most embarrassing delivery experiences I've had. I ordered sanitary pads, expecting the basic level of privacy that any customer deserves. Instead, the product was delivered completely uncovered—no Blinkit bag, no outer packaging, no discreet wrapping. The delivery partner simply took the sanitary pad packet out and handed it to me in full view. This is unacceptable. Sanitary products are personal and should always be delivered in discreet packaging. Such negligence

wallet payments are not at all working it always shows "This payment method is not available". Even in the time of emergencies I'm not able to order from this app, I hope the team resolved this issue..

Very bad experience with Blinkit. Product was defective and they neither replaced it nor accepted return. Customer support was not helpful at all and kept avoiding the issue. Waste of money and very disappointing service.

I assumed this application is trust worthy. However past few experience with this app has been horrible. Products either being delivered open, half eaten, damaged or missing. and despite of several complaints there was no resolution provided. People hired for customer support are rude and incompetent. After waiting for 30 minutes on chat support still no resolution. I would never recommend anyone ever to trust "Blinkit"!!!!

Do not order multiple items, their delivery system us corrupt. twice the most expensive item was not delivered. last time they just rejected the complaint and pocketed the money. customer serviceis lousy.

they don't give any clear solution..... when you face any problems with a product..... they will just give a promo code to your face and just keep it and shut up..... if you expect anything else they won't provide it.... if you want them to solve it a different way they want they will tell that they don't have the authority to do that....... it's not my first time it's my third time I get bad product default product when I ask them a refund they said the can't I am not satisfied with the result.

i nowadays hate blinkit due to its harsh system as there is no cancel option even after a few moments of confirmation and also even when delivery partners are not available they don't give an option to cancel orders also they are now charging much more delivery and handling fees and offers are also disgusting which always forces to order more . I will recommend Indians to use Instamart or do offline shopping especially in India . I hope blinkit would do improvement in future .

they are not giving myy cancellation and refund amount still cancelled order is on 25th April and still not given showing dates only yesterday's date shown but refund is not credited my account still and 2nd cancellation order refund is showing on 9th may now but how I'll assure them not getting my refund too muchh worst bad experience with blinkit 3rd class experience .

App works flawlessly. One feature request "if an order has food and non-food items. User should be able to pay with sodexo for food items and remaining amount with any other payment option". Jiomart has same implementation kindly check.

There's no problem with delivery and delivery timing. 3 times the bread I ordered lost its shape because of the untidy packing. 2) Why have you replaced the handle bags with the small bags without handles. - it is very inconvenient to carry the stuff home from the gate! - all items are stuffed in those small bags! When are you going to start using those nice bags with handles??

Had the worst experience while returning a item which doesn't fit the description... the app might deliver you fast but it will give u 100 excuses to not take the product back, even though it's not what you order

Blinkit is incredibly convenient and a massive time-saver for my daily needs. The lightning-fast delivery is a total mood maker, and knowing I can rely on them gives me true peace of mind. It’s more than just an app; it’s a genuine happiness and joy bringer that makes life so much smoother. Highly recommended for anyone looking to simplify their routine.

The store does not properly check items before sending them and ends up delivering spoiled products. Today, I received a rotten coconut that was already cracked. The coconut water was leaking into the paper bag, and because of that, the other items I had ordered inside the same bag were also damaged and ruined. I have used this app multiple times and my experience has not been good. There is no proper seriousness in their service. They send incorrect orders, sometimes mixing up orders between

Horrible customer support, cannot even reach out to customer support when needed the most. The delivery agent can take any amount of time to deliver order, not pick my call and there's nothing I can do as both Blinkit and the delivery agent would be unresponsive.

Incorrect order being delivered in the packaging. Pathetic customer service. No customer redressal mechanism. No quality checks shared. In short once you place an order you don't have any other option but to just accept this whatever is delivered to you. absolutely pathetic.

extra taxes are too much and minimal order should be of ₹100 as because of minimal order price we don't feel like ordering due to which either we order unnecessary product so as avoid small cart , surge taxes and handling charges.

consecutively the service is deteriorating. Bags are torned, milk packets are delivered leaked, very low rated service. It has been communicated many times and committed by service team that will not be repeated everything since last 2 months. I order almost every alternate day. Now it is a high time to switch to other service providers.
They have their big stores located nearby your locality , so they get your order in perfect condition and within time , ordered ice-cream 3 times not even single complaint.
